{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323193909F39E4992673AF4379EA3"}"},"total":11},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7617301805078135576","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，真的很不错，代入感极强天天都做选择题，对错全靠生存环境判断，选对能活能飞，选错离死不远了，哈哈！很有意思，全民生存升级的书第一次看，很新鲜很新颖值得一看，收藏必须收藏。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773544796,"group_id":"7605140990608821273","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"人间人人间人世间人鬼间人魔间人仙间都是幻人间","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+kUjGMJ1WeOM2zkPuRB6BI=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/790ad58e35c641beb411837b216c6c09~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794909&x-signature=AkyvD5IJ0nviGzfbXwRYyI8Xd5s%3D","user_id":"105033127445","user_name":"幻人间"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"105033127445","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7605140990608821273","book_info":{"abstract":"【全民求生＋全民觉醒天赋＋单女主＋升级流＋副本＋灾难＋组建势力】
就因为主角叶落晚上睡觉听全民求生小说助眠，从而导致70亿人类一夜之间被扔进一个名为“全民求生”的残酷游戏。
没有说明书，没有退路，只有冰冷的机械音宣告：活下去，或者死去。 
就在所有人绝望的时候，转天全民又觉醒了天赋能力。
这是一群求生者对抗天灾、人性、诡异与上位者的求生史诗。
只有饥饿、背叛、寒风、烈日、血月、兽潮……以及一颗越来越硬、越来越冷的心。
但人间自有真情在，叶落和他最忠诚的好同伴兽耳娘豹女，一起精挑细选所组成的队伍一路过关斩将、共破难关，最终携手站在最高点。
当大陆融合、位面碰撞、虚空入侵、神明降临……当诡异源头揭开“求生”真相。
叶落才发现：求生从来不是终点，而是无尽轮回的开始。
从一座小木屋，到团队领袖，再到一方霸主，最后到永恒，他求着求着，就求成了传说。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o202d3b06b4c307d9efbe1e1c555a3518~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"叫我神金就好","author_id":"","book_id":"7605140990608821273","book_name":"全民求生：开局一座小木屋","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8036人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":515,"name":"末日求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=515&name=末日求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":830,"name":"升级流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=830&name=升级流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7605141481036186174","read_count":"8036","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"154415"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"68","tags":"游戏体育,末日求生,系统,求生,开局,升级流,囤物资,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o202d3b06b4c307d9efbe1e1c555a3518~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779449949&x-signature=3nJH8pKoAdGwCB2gg4q3jJbHi24%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"219500522515703","extra":{"comment_
